name: Essence Distiller
description: Essence Distiller is an item purchasable at the Base Shop, under Support.

abilities.name: Soul Release
abilities.description: When cast on an ally, consumes a charge to grant the target allied hero bonus health regeneration for a while. Number of Charges: ∞. Cooldown: 10. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: 1000. Health Regen Bonus: 40. Duration: 8. When cast on an enemy, consumes a charge to deal damage over time and provide True Sight to the target for a while. Can be ground targeted to lie dormant and attach to the first enemy that comes within range.
